project.name: Quant System
project.description: A typed, solo-maintainable quant research and paper-trading system.

milestones.name: Repo Scaffold
milestones.purpose: Python project layout, typed models, CLI, tests, docs, and VectorBT backtest path.

milestones.name: GitHub and CI Foundation
milestones.purpose: GitHub repo, CI, Makefile commands, lockfile, and repeatable checks.

milestones.name: Backtest Artifacts
milestones.purpose: Durable backtest summaries and trade CSV outputs.

milestones.name: Multi-Modal Ingestion Foundation
milestones.purpose: Provider interface, raw datasets, yfinance market bars, normalized outputs, and text-model placeholders.

milestones.name: Data Validation v1
milestones.purpose: Market-bar validation and data validation CLI.

milestones.name: Validation Guardrails
milestones.purpose: Validation runs by default during ingestion and before CSV backtests.

milestones.name: Data Lineage v1
milestones.purpose: Validation reports and metadata link raw data, normalized data, provider, symbol, timestamps, and validation status.

milestones.name: Storage Abstraction v1
milestones.purpose: MarketBarStore boundary with CSV implementation.

milestones.name: Feature Engineering v1
milestones.purpose: Technical features from normalized and validated data.

milestones.name: Strategy Feature Interface
milestones.purpose: Strategies can consume typed feature inputs.

milestones.name: Provider Reconciliation
milestones.purpose: Compare normalized market-bar datasets from different sources.

milestones.name: Paper Trading Foundation
milestones.purpose: Paper broker, risk checks, orders, fills, positions, snapshots, and audit records.

milestones.name: Scheduler Loop v1
milestones.purpose: Finite scheduled task runs with durable run records.

milestones.name: Paper Signal Execution v1
milestones.purpose: Connect strategy signals to scheduled paper-trading decisions.

milestones.name: Broker State Persistence v1
milestones.purpose: Persist broker state so scheduled runs behave like one continuous paper account.

milestones.name: Idempotent Paper Signals v1
milestones.purpose: Prevent duplicate paper orders when the same signal is processed again.

milestones.name: Service Deployment v1
milestones.purpose: Define local and server wrapper, environment config, logs, and deployment docs.

milestones.name: Operational Observability v1
milestones.purpose: Add a read-only health command for scheduler, signal, state, and log artifacts.

milestones.name: Data Refresh Workflow v1
milestones.purpose: Refresh and validate provider data before scheduled paper signal execution.

milestones.name: Concurrent Run Safety v1
milestones.purpose: Prevent overlapping refresh workflow runs from mutating the same paper state.

milestones.name: Atomic State Writes v1
milestones.purpose: Write paper broker state through durable temp files, atomic replacement, and backups.

milestones.name: Paper State Reconciliation v1
milestones.purpose: Replay paper signal audit records and compare them against persisted broker state.

milestones.name: Health Check Integration v1
milestones.purpose: Surface lock and paper-state reconciliation status in operational health checks.

milestones.name: Dashboard Alert Status v1
milestones.purpose: Publish sanitized operational health status to the GitHub Pages dashboard.

milestones.name: Broker Adapter Boundary v1
milestones.purpose: Define the paper-vs-real broker boundary before adding real-money trading logic.

milestones.name: Live Trading Safety Gates v1
milestones.purpose: Add explicit controls that keep real-money trading impossible by default.

milestones.name: Dry-Run Broker Adapter v1
milestones.purpose: Add a live-shaped broker adapter that records intended orders without submitting them.
